leadText: The Odd Incense (Japanese: あやしいおこう Mysterious Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is an incense that allows Mr. Mime and Mr. Rime to produce Mime Jr. Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Twisted Spoon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves by 20%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Mr. Mime Egg , a Mime Jr. Egg is produced instead.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves by 20%.
